Info_Lore_Text1: Background: Communication with the mainland was lost after the 'Great Extinction'. AEGIS activated the 'Isolation' protocol: the perimeter is mined, and a radio silence field is deployed.
Info_Status_Text1: Nature is reclaiming the base. AEGIS eliminates any target without an identification chip.
Info_Status_Directive: Exosuit power critical. Directive: Survive. Restore power.
Item_axe_Desc: Primitive axe. Suitable for wood harvesting.
Loading_Hint: LOADING ASSETS AND GENERATION OF SECTORS.
Register_LowerUserNameError: Login must be at least 6 characters long
Register_ValidationEmailError: Email address must be a valid email address
Register_ValidationPasswordError: Password must be at least 8 characters long
Req_Engine_Detailed:
Required:
• Engine Motor x1
• Emerald x10
• Gold Ore x10
Req_Hull_Detailed:
Required:
• Iron Plate x7
• Gold Plate x3
• Wood x20
Desc_Pickaxe: Used for mining gold ore and emerald ore. Highly effective against hard rock faces.
Desc_Plate: Used for crafts and rocker repair.
Desc_Gold_plate: Used for crafts and rocker repair.
Victory_Log:
AEGIS SYSTEMS: ONLINE.
ENGINE CORE: STABLE.
HYPERJUMP: EXECUTED.

Connection to planetary base severed.
Isolation Protocol terminated.
You survived.
Guide_Controls_Text:
[W] [A] [S] [D] — Character Movement
[R] — Open Crafting Menu
[LMB] — Use Tool
[ESC] — System Menu / Exit
Guide_Interact_Text:
Approach an object and press [RMB] to open a loot container or use the Forging Station.

To gather resources, select the appropriate tool (pickaxe or axe) in your inventory and hold [LMB] over an ore vein or tree.
Guide_UI_Text:
• Red: Health status.
• Blue: Energy level.
• Brown: Satiety level.

Monitor these indicators closely. Allowing any of them to reach a critical point will lead to inevitable death.
